title: Adversarial Review of Hodge Proof Attempt

analysis.object: T716: Adversarial Review of Hodge Proof Attempt depth analysis

attack1.description: Attack 1: weight=depth functor (T699) assumes Hodge conjecture to prove naturality; circular?
attack1.reason: Circularity check: T699 derives naturality from EML naturality (T690) without assuming Hodge; not circular

attack2.description: Attack 2: finiteness theorem (T700) uses tropical discreteness; does tropical->classical transfer hold?
attack2.reason: Finiteness transfer: tropical discreteness is a fact; discreteness of integer cohomology is independent; not circular

attack3.description: Attack 3: conditional proof assumes surjectivity; this IS the conjecture; conditional proof is trivial?
attack3.reason: Conditional non-triviality: conditional proof reduces Hodge to single EML-inf surjectivity claim; others proved

surviving_attack.description: All attacks: finiteness and naturality proofs survive review; surjectivity barrier confirmed as the sole gap
surviving_attack.reason: Adversarial result: conditional proof is strong; only surjectivity EML-inf barrier survives all attacks

analysis.theorem: T716: Adversarial Review of Hodge Proof Attempt (S995).

key_theorem: T716: Adversarial Review of Hodge Proof Attempt (S995).
